raw_comment:
What do you notice?
  -Both Basketball Associations have the highest diversity in players with a higher percentage than 80%
  -Major League Soccer has the highest amount of diversity in head coaches at 41% the weakest being National Football League
What do you Wonder?
   - Why Major league soccer has the highest diversity for head coaches.
    - why does Women's National Basketball Association have no data of 2020
    - Why was data self-reported and no actual research done.
What Impact does this have on you and your community?
     - My family and I are Latinos and we can see the lack of diversity in many leaders of sports and the results don't really surprise us. 
Catchy Headline
      - "Diversity weaving it's way to sports"
ace_sentences: Both Basketball Associations have the highest diversity in players.
Both Basketball Associations have a percentage higher than 80%.
Major League Soccer has the highest amount of diversity in head coaches.
Major League Soccer has 41% diversity in head coaches.
The National Football League is the weakest in diversity in head coaches.
I wonder why Major league soccer has the highest diversity for head coaches.
I wonder why Women's National Basketball Association has no data of 2020.
I wonder why data was self-reported.
I wonder why no actual research was done.
My family and I are Latinos.
My family and I can see the lack of diversity in many leaders of sports.
The results do not really surprise us.
The headline is "Diversity weaving it's way to sports".
